results.title: Meta’s threads hits 500 million monthly active users with major community updates
results.description: Threads has reached 500 million monthly active users and introduced new features aimed at improving personalization and community engagement. The platform’s new “Your Algo” tool lets users privately customize their feeds, while Communities has exited beta with a new discovery hub.

results.title: Hyderabad: Massive Fire At EV-bike Warehouse In Moosapet
results.description: A massive fire broke out at an electric vehicle (EV) warehouse in the Moosapet area on Monday afternoon.
